subject: fix(structure): sync ContextBar cell selection to Structure tab editing state
body:
When users select a cell in the ContextBar, the Structure tab now
activates that cell for editing (showing section/cell controls) instead
of only showing a subtle ring indicator. Uses a ref to distinguish
external selection changes from internal toggle-to-deselect behavior.

Tags: structure, cell-selector, sync, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cell-selection
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01XMBKAtRpSbt1Y7S672be6V
title: sync ContextBar cell selection to Structure tab editing state
